results.Label: capacity planning, level-1, add
results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = copy.deepcopy(graph_data)
    graph_copy.add_node('new_EK_PORT_90', type=['EK_PORT'], physical_capacity_bps=1000)
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a4.m4.s2c2', 'new_EK_PORT_90', type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return_object = {
        'type': 'graph',
        'data': graph_json,
        'updated_graph': graph_json
    }
    return return_object

def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = copy.deepcopy(graph_data)
    graph_copy.add_node('new_EK_PORT_89', type=['EK_PORT'], physical_capacity_bps=1000)
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a3.m3', 'new_EK_PORT_89', type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    child_nodes = [node[0] for node in graph_copy.nodes(data=True) if any(edge[1]['type'] == ['RK_CONTAINS'] and edge[0] == 'ju1.a3.m3' for edge in graph_copy.edges(data=True) if edge[1]['type'] == ['RK_CONTAINS'] and (edge[0] == 'ju1.a3.m3' and edge[1] == node[0]))]
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return_object = {
        'type': 'list',
        'data': child_nodes,
        'updated_graph': graph_json
    }
    return return_object

results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = copy.deepcopy(graph_data)
    graph_copy.add_node('new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_49', type=['EK_PACKET_SWITCH'])
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.s3.dom', 'new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_49', type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    child_nodes = [node[0] for node in graph_copy.nodes(data=True) if any(edge[1]['type'] == ['RK_CONTAINS'] and edge[0] == 'ju1.s3.dom' for edge in graph_copy.out_edges(node[0], data=True))]
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return_object = {'type': 'list', 'data': child_nodes, 'updated_graph': graph_json}
    return return_object

results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = copy.deepcopy(graph_data)
    graph_copy.add_node('new_EK_PORT_70', type=['EK_PORT'], physical_capacity_bps=1000)
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a2.m4', 'new_EK_PORT_70', type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    child_nodes = [node[0] for node in graph_copy.nodes(data=True) if graph_copy.has_edge('ju1.a2.m4', node[0])]
    return_object = {

        'data': child_nodes,
        'updated_graph': nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    }
    return return_object

results.Query: Add node with name 'new_EK_PORT_72' to ju1.a4.dom. Rank direct child nodes of ju1.a4.dom in the updated graph based on physical_capacity_bps attribute. Return a list of tuple, each tuple has node name and its total physical capacity.
results.Label: capacity planning, level-3, add-rank
results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = copy.deepcopy(graph_data)
    graph_copy.add_node('new_EK_PORT_72', type=['EK_PORT'], physical_capacity_bps=1000)
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a4.dom', 'new_EK_PORT_72', type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    child_nodes = [(node[0], node[1].get('physical_capacity_bps', 0)) for node in graph_copy.nodes(data=True) if node[0].startswith('ju1.a4.') and 'EK_PORT' in node[1]['type']]
    child_nodes.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return {'type': 'list', 'data': child_nodes, 'updated_graph': graph_json}
